'''vozapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equibiaxial|equibiaxial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equibiaxial|equibiaxial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozapithi|vozapithi]] || [[word:vozapiji|vozapiji]] || [[word:vozapishi|vozapishi]] || [[word:vozapiki|vozapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozaputhuthu|vozaputhuthu]] || [[word:vozapujuju|vozapujuju]] || [[word:vozapushushu|vozapushushu]] || [[word:vozapukuku|vozapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozaputhu|vozaputhu]] || [[word:vozapuju|vozapuju]] || [[word:vozapushu|vozapushu]] || [[word:vozapuku|vozapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozapufthuf|vozapufthuf]] || [[word:vozapufjuf|vozapufjuf]] || [[word:vozapufshuf|vozapufshuf]] || [[word:vozapufkuf|vozapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozapethe|vozapethe]] || [[word:vozapeje|vozapeje]] || [[word:vozapeshe|vozapeshe]] || [[word:vozapeke|vozapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozapothotho|vozapothotho]] || [[word:vozapojojo|vozapojojo]] || [[word:vozaposhosho|vozaposhosho]] || [[word:vozapokoko|vozapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozapotho|vozapotho]] || [[word:vozapojo|vozapojo]] || [[word:vozaposho|vozaposho]] || [[word:vozapoko|vozapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozapofthof|vozapofthof]] || [[word:vozapofjof|vozapofjof]] || [[word:vozapofshof|vozapofshof]] || [[word:vozapofkof|vozapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfthÃŸf|vozapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfjÃŸf|vozapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfshÃŸf|vozapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfkÃŸf|vozapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vozapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vozapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vozapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vozapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfthÃŸf|vozapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfjÃŸf|vozapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfshÃŸf|vozapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfkÃŸf|vozapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfthÃŸf|vozapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfjÃŸf|vozapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfshÃŸf|vozapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozapÃŸfkÃŸf|vozapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozapÃḊthÃḊ|vozapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vozapÃḊjÃḊ|vozapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vozapÃḊshÃḊ|vozapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vozapÃḊkÃḊ|vozapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozapathatha|vozapathatha]] || [[word:vozapajaja|vozapajaja]] || [[word:vozapashasha|vozapashasha]] || [[word:vozapakaka|vozapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozapatha|vozapatha]] || [[word:vozapaja|vozapaja]] || [[word:vozapasha|vozapasha]] || [[word:vozapaka|vozapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozapafthaf|vozapafthaf]] || [[word:vozapafjaf|vozapafjaf]] || [[word:vozapafshaf|vozapafshaf]] || [[word:vozapafkaf|vozapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozapasha|vozapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozapshÃḋasha|vozapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozaproasha|vozaproasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozapmuasha|vozapmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozapyaasha|vozapyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozapnkshÃḋasha|govozapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozapnkroasha|govozapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozapnkmuasha|govozapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozapnkyaasha|govozapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozazapasha|vozazapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozazapshÃḋasha|vozazapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozazaproasha|vozazaproasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozazapmuasha|vozazapmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozazapyaasha|vozazapyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozazapnkshÃḋasha|govozazapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozazapnkroasha|govozazapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozazapnkmuasha|govozazapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozazapnkyaasha|govozazapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezÃḊpasha|vezÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezÃḊpshÃḋasha|vezÃḊpshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezÃḊproasha|vezÃḊproasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezÃḊpmuasha|vezÃḊpmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezÃḊpyaasha|vezÃḊpyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezÃḊpnkshÃḋasha|govezÃḊpnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezÃḊpnkroasha|govezÃḊpnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezÃḊpnkmuasha|govezÃḊpnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezÃḊpnkyaasha|govezÃḊpnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozfapasha|vozfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozfapshÃḋasha|vozfapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozfaproasha|vozfaproasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozfapmuasha|vozfapmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozfapyaasha|vozfapyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozfapnkshÃḋasha|govozfapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozfapnkroasha|govozfapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozfapnkmuasha|govozfapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozfapnkyaasha|govozfapnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
